_note: The Divided Kingdom in detail (~900-800 BC), four threads. (1) JUDAH'S REAL KINGS that Matthew 1 skips: the existing spine already jumps Joram->Uzziah with a card noting '3 kings omitted in Matthew', so the three omitted Davidic kings are added here as a PARALLEL real line WITHOUT re-parenting the existing UZZIAH. Joram of Judah + Athaliah (existing empty family, so this APPENDS) -> Ahaziah of Judah (killed by Jehu, 2 Kings 9); then Athaliah usurped the throne; the rescued infant heir Joash/Jehoash (mother Zibiah of Beersheba, 2 Kings 12:1) -> Amaziah (mother Jehoaddan of Jerusalem, 2 Kings 14:2). Amaziah was historically Uzziah's father but is NOT joined to Uzziah here, to avoid double-parenting the compressed Matthew line; flagged on his card. Joash's rescuers, the high priest Jehoiada and his aunt Jehosheba (daughter of King Joram, sister of Ahaziah, 2 Chron 22:11), are added as their own married pair. (2) THE PROPHETS of this era, standalone: Elijah the Tishbite of Gilead (opposed Ahab & Jezebel and Baal worship, 1 Kings 17-2 Kings 2), and Elisha son of Shaphat of Abel-meholah, his successor (1 Kings 19). (3) THE JEHU DYNASTY of the north (Jehu->Jehoahaz->Jehoash->Jeroboam II->Zechariah) is ALREADY fully built as a succession chain in 10a_israel.json, so it is not duplicated here. (4) MOAB: King Mesha of the Mesha Stele (Moabite Stone), who rebelled against Israel after Ahab's death (2 Kings 3), son of King Kemosh-yat per the stele; attached to the existing Moabite founder MOAB via a flagged ethnic bridge (Kemosh-yat is a distant descendant, not a literal son; ~1000+ yrs elided). Dates approximate (Thiele reign years) and decrease down each descent. Sorts after 10a/07_biblical/07k so JORAM, ATHALIAH, MOAB exist first.

children.label:
👑 Ahaziah of Judah
c.860 BC · King of Judah, son of Joram & Athaliah; reigned ~841 BC, killed by Jehu · 2 Kings 8-9

b.label:
Zibiah of Beersheba
wife of Ahaziah; mother of Joash · 2 Kings 12:1

children.label:
👑 Joash (Jehoash) of Judah
c.843 BC · King of Judah; rescued as an infant & hidden from Athaliah's purge, later crowned; reigned ~835-796 BC · 2 Kings 11-12

b.label:
Jehoaddan of Jerusalem
wife of Joash; mother of Amaziah · 2 Kings 14:2

children.label:
👑 Amaziah
c.820 BC · King of Judah; reigned ~796-767 BC · 2 Kings 14
(historically the father of Uzziah, but the tree follows Matthew's compressed Joram→Uzziah line, so not re-parented here)

a.label:
Jehoiada
c.885 BC · high priest who hid the infant Joash six years, overthrew Athaliah & crowned Joash king · 2 Kings 11, 2 Chron 22-24

b.label:
Jehosheba (Jehoshabeath)
c.865 BC · daughter of King Joram of Judah & sister of Ahaziah; wife of the priest Jehoiada; rescued the infant Joash from Athaliah · 2 Kings 11:2, 2 Chron 22:11

a.label:
Elijah the Tishbite
c.870 BC · prophet of Gilead; opposed Ahab & Jezebel and the worship of Baal; taken up in a whirlwind · 1 Kings 17 - 2 Kings 2

Shaphat
c.900 BC · of Abel-meholah; father of the prophet Elisha · 1 Kings 19:16

children.label:
Elisha
c.870 BC · prophet, son of Shaphat; successor to Elijah with a double portion of his spirit · 1 Kings 19 - 2 Kings 13

King Kemosh-yat of Moab
c.880 BC · father of King Mesha per the Mesha Stele; a distant descendant of Moab (ethnic bridge, not a literal son; ~1000+ yrs elided) · Mesha Stele (bridge)

👑 Mesha
c.840 BC · King of Moab of the Moabite Stone (Mesha Stele); rebelled against Israel after Ahab's death · 2 Kings 3, Mesha Stele
